content:
5. Term of Agreement
This Agreement shall commence at the Effective Date and will continue in effect until terminated by either party with thirty (30) days written notice, or until the Disclosing Party sends a written notice releasing the Receiving Party from this Agreement.

6. Return of Materials
Upon termination of this Agreement, all Confidential Information, including copies and documentation, must be returned or destroyed as directed by the Disclosing Party.

7. No Licensing
The disclosure of Confidential Information pursuant to this Agreement shall not constitute an express or implied license under any patents or other intellectual property or proprietary rights of the Disclosing Party or its affiliates.

8. Governing Law
This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State or Country in which the Disclosing Party is located, excluding its conflict of law principles.

9. Entire Agreement
This document constitutes the entire agreement between the parties concerning the disclosure of Confidential Information and supersedes all prior agreements, understandings, negotiations and discussions, whether oral or written, of the parties.
context: From document: Ulti Tool Media & SFLLUX NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT — chunk 4 (chunk 4/5)
